reviewNotes: Synthetic public fixture only; all catalog records, demand facts, capability evidence, and ranking outputs are hand-authored.
Private-local evidence is represented as aggregate counts and coarse readiness only.
The leakage policy below records forbidden private data classes; this fixture includes only synthetic public facts and aggregate-safe evidence.
Expected scores are deterministic after generatedAt is normalized by tests; ties sort by score descending, canonicalTitle ascending, then workId ascending.

decisionRules.candidate: score is ranked as a public opportunity when no blocking official-or-complete English status or open platform-language conflict applies
decisionRules.demoted: candidate has useful public metadata but an open platform-language conflict applies
decisionRules.excluded: candidate has an official or complete existing English translation status

limitations: patch support is not claimed by public fixture
secondary-key and patch workflows are outside this public fixture
no helper logs or key material
public fixture does not claim extract or patch support
